languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn tries to say something, looks back at Nuncius, and bows his head.{/n} "Of course, Rogue Trader, I admit defeat."

languages.text: {n}Эоганн силится что-то сказать, оглядывается на Нунциуса и склоняет голову.{/n} "Естественно, Вольный Торговец, я признаю поражение".
{n}Eogunn tries to say something, looks back at Nuncius, and bows his head.{/n} "Of course, Rogue Trader, I admit defeat."
languages.original_text: {n}Эоганн силится что-то сказать, оглядывается на Нунциуса и склоняет голову.{/n} "Естественно, Вольный Торговец, я признаю поражение".

{n}Eogunn tries to say something, looks back at Nuncius, and bows his head.{/n} "Of course, Rogue Trader, I admit defeat."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn intenta decir algo, mira a Nuncius y agacha la cabeza.{/n} «Por supuesto, Comerciante. Admito la derrota».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn tries to say something, looks back at Nuncius, and bows his head.{/n} "Of course, Rogue Trader, I admit defeat."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn intenta decir algo, mira a Nuncius y agacha la cabeza.{/n} «Por supuesto, Comerciante. Admito la derrota».

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡似乎想说什么，回头看了看努恩修斯后，他低下了头。{/n}“当然，行商浪人，我认输。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn tries to say something, looks back at Nuncius, and bows his head.{/n} "Of course, Rogue Trader, I admit defeat."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡似乎想说什么，回头看了看努恩修斯后，他低下了头。{/n}“当然，行商浪人，我认输。”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn cherche à dire quelque chose, lance un regard en arrière à Nuncius et incline la tête.{/n} « Bien entendu, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Je reconnais ma défaite. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn tries to say something, looks back at Nuncius, and bows his head.{/n} "Of course, Rogue Trader, I admit defeat."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn cherche à dire quelque chose, lance un regard en arrière à Nuncius et incline la tête.{/n} « Bien entendu, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Je reconnais ma défaite. »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn versucht, etwas zu sagen, wirft einen Blick auf Nuncius und senkt schließlich den Kopf.{/n} "Natürlich, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Ich gestehe meine Niederlage ein."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn tries to say something, looks back at Nuncius, and bows his head.{/n} "Of course, Rogue Trader, I admit defeat."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn versucht, etwas zu sagen, wirft einen Blick auf Nuncius und senkt schließlich den Kopf.{/n} "Natürlich, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Ich gestehe meine Niederlage ein."

languages.text: {n}エオグンは何か言おうとして、ヌンシウスを振り返り、頭を下げた。{/n}「もちろんだ、ローグ・トレーダー、負けを認めよう」。
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn tries to say something, looks back at Nuncius, and bows his head.{/n} "Of course, Rogue Trader, I admit defeat."

languages.text: {n}Bir şeyler söylemeye çalışan Eogunn, dönüp Nuncius'a bakıyor ve başını eğiyor.{/n} "Elbette Hür Tacir, yenilgiyi kabul ediyorum."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn tries to say something, looks back at Nuncius, and bows his head.{/n} "Of course, Rogue Trader, I admit defeat."
